summary: Video. A Fox News (Hannity) panel segment with Stephen Miller and Kayleigh McEnany reacting to President Biden's joint address to Congress, with Fox chyrons and a split-screen of pundits. It is a recorded cable-news interview and panel. It is tagged as advertisement; it is a news and TV clip.
notable_text: Fox News chyrons: 'KAYLEIGH MCENANY OUTNUMBERED CO-HOST'; 'TIM SCOTT: AMERICA IS NOT A RACIST COUNTRY'; 'DRESSED UP IN BUMPER STICKER SLOGANS AND CLICHES, BIDEN PLAN IS MORE TAXES, MORE DEBT, AND AMNESTY'; HANNITY
